lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَوَّلُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَآخِرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Awwalu kulli shay'in wa ākhiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the First of everything and its Last
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin evveli ve âhiri olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ ظَاهِرُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَبَاطِنُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Ẓāhiru kulli shay'in wa bāṭinuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Manifest of everything and its Hidden
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin zâhiri ve bâtını olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُمِيتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Khāliqu kulli shay'in wa mumītuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Creator of everything and its Destroyer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin yaratıcısı ve yok edicisi olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَالِمُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُخْبِرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa 'Ālimu kulli shay'in wa mukhbiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the Knower of everything and its Informer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin bileni ve haber vereni olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ رَازِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُيَسِّرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Rāziqu kulli shay'in wa muyassiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the Provider of everything and its Facilitator
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin rızık vereni ve kolaylaştıranı olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَالِكُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَحَاكِمُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Māliku kulli shay'in wa ḥākimuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Owner of everything and its Ruler
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin sahibi ve hâkimi olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُبْدِئُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُعِيدُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Mubdi'u kulli shay'in wa mu'īduh

translation.en: O He Who is the Originator of everything and its Restorer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin başlatanı ve iade edeni olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنْشِئُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُقَدِّرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Munshi'u kulli shay'in wa muqaddiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the Causer of everything and its Former
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin inşa edeni ve takdir edeni olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُحْيِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُمِيتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Muḥyī kulli shay'in wa mumītuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Giver of life to everything and its Taker
translation.tr: Ey her şeye hayat veren ve onu alan olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَوَارِثُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Khāliqu kulli shay'in wa wārithuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Creator of everything and its Inheritor
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin yaratıcısı ve vârisi olan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yadhkuru wa lā yansā

translation.en: O He Who remembers and is not forgetful

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yakhluqu wa lā yukhlaq

translation.en: O He Who creates and is not created

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yahdī wa lā yuhdā

translation.en: O He Who guides and is not guided
translation.tr: Ey hidayet eden ve hidayete muhtaç olmayan

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuḥyī wa lā yamūt

translation.en: O He Who gives life and does not die

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yarzuqu wa lā yurzaq

translation.en: O He Who provides and is not provided for

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuṭ'imu wa lā yuṭ'am

translation.en: O He Who feeds and is not fed

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yujīru wa lā yujāru 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who protects and is not protected
translation.tr: Ey koruyan ve korunmaya muhtaç olmayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْضِي وَلَا يُقْضَى عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yaqḍī wa lā yuqḍā 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who decrees and is not decreed upon

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَحْكُمُ وَلَا يُحْكَمُ عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yaḥkumu wa lā yuḥkamu 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who judges and is not judged

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yabqā wa lā yafnā

translation.en: O He Who is Eternal and does not perish
translation.tr: Ey bâkî olan ve fânî olmayan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Best Helper
O Best Judge
O Best Companion
O Best Beloved
O Best Master
O Best Guide
O Best Healer
O Best Responder
O Best Guardian
O Best Enricher

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُدْرَتِهِ عَزِيزٌ

translation.en: O He Who is in power and is Mighty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O He Who is concealed and is All-Knowing

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِبَادَتِهِ شَكُورٌ

translation.en: O He Who is worshipped and is Thankful

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عِنْدَ مَعْصِيَتِهِ غَفُورٌ

translation.en: O He Who is disobeyed and is Forgiving
O He Who is not contained in thought
O He Who is not perceived by sight

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: O He Who is not hidden from anything
translation.tr: Ey hiçbir şey Kendisine gizli kalmayan

translation.en: O He Who is not mixed with doubt
O He Who is the Creator of the human being

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ فِي مُلْكِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā sharīka lahū fī mulkih

translation.en: O He Who has no partner in His sovereignty

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيمُ
lines.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka bi'smika yā Raḥmānu yā Raḥīm

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your Name, O Compassionate, O Merciful
translation.tr: Allah'ım, isminin hakkı için Senden istiyorum, ey Rahmân, ey Rahîm

translation.en: O Eternal, O Self-Subsisting
O Majestic, O Generous
O Beautiful, O Sovereign
O Nourisher, O Responder
O Opener, O Knower
O Reducer, O Expander
O Abaser, O Exalter
O Honorer, O Humiliator
O All-Hearing, O All-Seeing

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ وَسِعَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man wasi'at raḥmatuhū kulla shay'

translation.en: O He Whose mercy encompasses everything
O He Whose mercy precedes His wrath
O He Whose mercy encompasses all creation
O He Whose mercy is a treasure for the sincere
translation.tr: Ey rahmeti ihlâs sahipleri için hazine olan

translation.en: O He Who sent His messengers with mercy
O He Who revealed His books with mercy

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَرْجُو رَحْمَتَهُ كُلُّ الْخَلَائِقِ

translation.en: O He Whose mercy is sought by all creation

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَطْمَعُ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ الْمُذْنِبُونَ

translation.en: O He Whose mercy is hoped for by sinners

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَنْقَطِعُ رَحْمَتُهُ أَبَدًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā tanqaṭi'u raḥmatuhū abadā

translation.en: O He Whose mercy has no end

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ الرَّحْمَةَ فِي قُلُوبِ عِبَادِهِ

translation.en: O He Who placed mercy in the hearts of His servants

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He in Whom the fearful find refuge
O He in Whom the hopeful find hope
O He in Whom the seekers find guidance
O He in Whom the striving ones find assistance
O He in Whom the oppressed find justice
O He in Whom the believers find tranquility
O He in Whom the repentant find acceptance
O He in Whom the asking ones find generosity
O He in Whom the weak find strength
O He in Whom the needy find sufficiency

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ بِغَيْرِ عَمَدٍ

translation.en: O He Who created the heavens without pillars
O He Who spread the earth as a dwelling
O He Who placed the mountains as pegs
O He Who made the sun a lamp
O He Who made the moon a light
O He Who made the stars for guidance
O He Who made the sea serviceable
O He Who made the rivers flow
O He Who made the springs gush forth

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَزْوَاجًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man khalaqa kulla shay'in azwājā

translation.en: O He Who created everything in pairs

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَحَاطَ عِلْمُهُ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man aḥāṭa 'ilmuhū bi kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Whose knowledge encompasses all things
O He Whose patience encompasses the sinners
O He Whose generosity encompasses the needy
O He Whose blessings encompass all creation
O He Whose kingdom has no end

lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā ḥadda li jalālih

translation.en: O He Whose glory has no limit
O He Whose perfection cannot be described
O He Whose grandeur cannot be perceived
O He Whose decree cannot be repelled
O He Whose attributes cannot be enumerated

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who gives to those who ask

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي مَنْ لَمْ يَسْأَلْهُ تَفَضُّلًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yu'ṭī man lam yas'alhu tafaḍḍulā

translation.en: O He Who gives to those who do not ask, out of His mercy

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي الْفَرَجَ بَعْدَ الشِّدَّةِ

translation.en: O He Who gives comfort after hardship

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي الْهُدَى بَعْدَ الضَّلَالَةِ

translation.en: O He Who gives guidance after misguidance

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي الْعَفْوَ بَعْدَ الذَّنْبِ

translation.en: O He Who gives pardon after sin

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي النِّعَمَ بِغَيْرِ سُؤَالٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yu'ṭī'n-ni'ama bi ghayri su'āl

translation.en: O He Who gives blessings without being asked
O He Who is the most Generous of the generous
O He Who is the most Knowing of the knowledgeable
O He Who is the most Powerful of the powerful
O He Who is the most Merciful of those who show mercy

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Originator of the heavens
O Creator of darkness and light
O Author of glory and generosity
O Author of majesty and beauty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا صَاحِبَةَ لَهُ وَلَا وَلَدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā ṣāḥibata lahū wa lā walad

translation.en: O He Who has no consort and no child

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ فِي الْمُلْكِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā sharīka lahū fi'l-mulk

translation.en: O He Who has no partner in sovereignty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا وَزِيرَ لَهُ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā wazīra lahū fī sulṭānih

translation.en: O He Who has no minister in His authority

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا مُشِيرَ لَهُ فِي حُكْمِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā mushīra lahū fī ḥukmih

translation.en: O He Who has no advisor in His rule

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا مَثِيلَ لَهُ فِي خَلْقِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā mathīla lahū fī khalqih

translation.en: O He Who has no likeness in His creation

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا نَظِيرَ لَهُ فِي وُجُودِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā naẓīra lahū fī wujūdih

translation.en: O He Who has no equal in His existence

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Whose treasures never diminish
O He Whose kingdom never ends
O He Whose blessings cannot be counted
O He Whose wisdom cannot be fathomed
O He Whose mercy cannot be measured
O He Whose generosity cannot be repaid
O He Whose power cannot be overcome
O He Whose authority cannot be challenged
O He Whose attributes cannot be comprehended
O He Whose greatness cannot be imagined

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Allah, O Most Merciful
O Most Compassionate, O Most Holy
O Sovereign, O Source of Peace
O Guardian of Faith, O Protector
O Almighty, O Compeller
O Supreme, O Creator
O Originator, O Fashioner
O Forgiver, O Subduer
O Bestower, O Provider
O Opener, O All-Knowing

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Light of the heavens and the earth
O Beautifier of the heavens and the earth
O Creator of the heavens and the earth
O Originator of the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökleri ve yeri yoktan var eden

translation.en: O He Who illuminates the heavens and the earth
O Key of the heavens and the earth
O Designer of the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökleri ve yeri tedbir eden

translation.en: O Provider for the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerin ve yerin rızık vericisi

translation.en: O Lord of the heavens and the earth
O Sovereign of the heavens and the earth

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Gentle One Who is not harsh
O Patient One Who is not hasty
O Generous One Who is not stingy
O Wise One Who is not frivolous
O Eternal One Who does not sleep
O Self-Subsisting Who does not eat
O Powerful One Who does not tire
O Great One Who is not small
O Mighty One Who is not weak
O Giver Who does not withhold

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yarā wa lā yurā

translation.en: O He Who sees but is not seen

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yakhluqu wa lā yukhlaq

translation.en: O He Who creates but is not created

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yahdī wa lā yuhdā

translation.en: O He Who guides but is not guided
translation.tr: Ey hidayet eden fakat hidayete muhtaç olmayan

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuḥyī wa lā yamūt

translation.en: O He Who gives life but does not die
O He Who is asked and grants

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuṭ'imu wa lā yuṭ'am

translation.en: O He Who feeds but is not fed

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yujīru wa lā yujāru 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who protects but needs no protection
translation.tr: Ey koruyan fakat korunmaya muhtaç olmayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْضِي وَلَا يُقْضَى عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yaqḍī wa lā yuqḍā 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who decrees and none decrees over Him

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَحْكُمُ وَلَا يُحْكَمُ عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yaḥkumu wa lā yuḥkamu 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who judges and none judges over Him

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lam yalid wa lam yūlad

translation.en: O He Who begets not and is not begotten

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Most Exalted of the exalted
O Most Generous of the generous
O Most Merciful of the merciful
O Most Knowing of the knowledgeable
O Most Wise of the wise
O Most Ancient of the ancient
O Most Great of the great
O Most Gentle of the gentle
O Most Powerful of the powerful
O Most Beneficent of the beneficent

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who hears all voices
O He Who answers all prayers
O He Who precedes all things
O He Who fulfills all promises
O He Who enriches all the poor
O He Who knows all secrets
O He Who responds to all emergencies
O He Who possesses all perfection
O He Who is the Bestower of all blessings
O He Who is the Source of all bounty

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of the Sacred House
O Lord of the Sacred Month
O Lord of the Sacred Land
O Lord of the Rukn and the Maqam
O Lord of the Mash'ar al-Haram
O Lord of the Halal and the Haram
O Lord of light and darkness
O Lord of greeting and peace
O Lord of power over all creation
O Lord of the living and the dead

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ الْقُدْرَةُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: O He Who has power over all things
O He Who knows all things
O He Who perceives all things

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuḥīṭu bi kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who encompasses all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَرِيبٌ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa qarībun min kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who is Near to all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ شَهِيدٌ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa shahīdun 'alā kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who is Witness to all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ حَفِيظٌ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa ḥafīẓun 'alā kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who is Guardian over all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَالِبٌ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa ghālibun 'alā kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who prevails over all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُبْدِئُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Mubdi'u kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who originates all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُعِيدُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Mu'īdu kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who returns all things

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Forgiver of sins
O Remover of afflictions
O End of hopes
O Giver of abundant gifts
O Bestower of blessings
O Provider of sustenance to creation
O Decreer of destinies
O Hearer of complaints
O Sender of messengers
O Liberator of captives

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Praised One in His actions
O Magnificent in His ways
O Glorious in His sovereignty
O Great in His generosity
O Exalted in His authority
O Ancient before anything existed
translation.tr: Ey her şeyden önce var olan

translation.en: O Exalted in His supremacy
O Beautiful in His mercy
O Generous to His servants
O Powerful in His strength

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Sufficient for those who seek sufficiency
O Guide for those who seek guidance
O Protector of those who seek protection
O Merciful to those who seek mercy
O Forgiver of those who seek forgiveness
O Helper of those who seek help
O Enricher of those who seek enrichment
O Refuge for those who seek refuge
O Fulfiller for those who seek fulfillment
O Healer for those who seek healing

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who has no partner
O He Who has no equal
O He Who has no like
O He Who has no minister
O He Who has no advisor
O He Who has no assistant
O He Who has no rival
O He Who has no match
O He Who has no opposite
O He Who has no associate

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Creator of all creation
O King of all kingdoms
O Provider for all provisions
O Owner of all souls
O Remover of all difficulties
O Hearer of all sounds
O Witness to all creation
O Rescuer from all calamities
O Present in all gatherings
O Near despite His exaltation

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.
